name: Social Work
student_summary: Professional social work — families, communities, institutions.
overview: Professional social work — families, communities, institutions. Social Work sits in the Community Practice family of Social Impact, Psychology & Community Services. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You want work that serves your community or country
who_should_avoid: You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person
daily_responsibilities: Collaborate with your team using community organization
Keep improving at programme delivery — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Demand is booming: opportunities across India and beyond
A broad Community Practice foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Location-bound work; postings and relocation are part of the deal
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Social Work is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of community organization
projects: Beginner: explore casework with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Case systems
smaller_city_scope: Viable in smaller cities — demand exists well beyond the metros.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward NGO & Development Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Child Welfare & Protection: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Community Health Work: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Social Work pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹10 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Social Science, Any. Typical degrees: BSW + MSW (TISS and others). Alternatives exist: any degree + msw.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Social Work evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Social Work is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
